title: Cryopreservation of thraustochytrids
steps: Centrifuge 1 ml of cells (log phase in 1/2 790) at 4000g for 2 min, 25 C 1/2 790 medium 0.05% yeast extract 0.05% peptone 0.25% glucose 1.8% Instant Ocean
Add 600 ul of fresh 1/2 790 media and resuspend by vortexing and/or pipetting up and down.
To 600 ul cells: Add 300 ul horse serum Add 100 ul DMSO (Me 2 SO) or Add 600 ul of 40% glycerol
Transfer cells to cryotube, freeze at -80 C and store in -80 C
Upon removal from -80 C, scrape cells and spread onto agar/media plate and incubate at regular growth temperature.
creator: Mariana Rius
